description: npm install paper @types/paper. Create src/model/pathBooleans.ts (~100 lines): pathBoolean(d1, d2, op) lazy-loads Paper.js, creates offscreen canvas, imports SVG path d strings, performs boolean op (unite/subtract/intersect/exclude/divide), exports result d strings. Paper.js ~65KB gzipped, loaded on first op only.
title: Install Paper.js and create pathBooleans.ts wrapper

close_reason: freeTransformTool.ts with unified scale/rotate/skew + detectMode + icon + 8 tests
description: Create src/tools/freeTransformTool.ts (~250 lines): combines scale + rotate + skew in one tool (shortcut Q). Corner handles = scale, outside corners = rotate, Ctrl+edge = skew. Bounding box follows full transform (parallelogram for skewed elements). Extracts shared helpers from selectTool.ts for scale/rotate math. Register in registerAllTools.ts. Write 8 tests.
title: Free transform tool

close_reason: opacityMask.ts mirroring clipping.ts pattern + Make/Release in Object menu + 4 tests
description: Create src/model/opacityMask.ts (~80 lines): follows clipping.ts pattern. Select 2 elements (mask shape on top, target below). Create <mask> in <defs>, move mask shape into it, apply mask=url(#mask-id) to target. Release reverses. Add to Object menu. Write 4 tests.
title: Opacity masks (SVG mask element)

title: fileio.ts tests (10 tests)

close_reason: compoundPath.ts with make/release + 8 tests + menu items

Add Make Compound Path and Release Compound Path to Object menu in App.tsx. Write 6 tests.
title: Compound path support (make/release)

close_reason: textPath.ts with placeTextOnPath/releaseTextFromPath + Object menu items + PropertiesPanel startOffset + 6 tests
description: Create src/model/textPath.ts (~80 lines): placeTextOnPath(doc, history, textEl, pathEl) creates <text><textPath href=#path-id>content</textPath></text>, removes standalone text. releaseTextFromPath(doc, history, textEl) reverses. SVG does the rendering natively. Add Place Text on Path and Release Text from Path to Object menu. Show startOffset property in PropertiesPanel for textPath elements. Write 6 tests.

close_reason: lassoTool.ts with ray-casting point-in-polygon + lasso icon + 4 tests

Point-in-polygon via ray casting algorithm. Register tool with shortcut. Write 4 tests.

close_reason: pdfImport.ts with MuPDF WASM lazy-load + DocumentWriter SVG device + postProcessPdfSvg + File menu + 5 tests
description: npm install mupdf. Create src/model/pdfImport.ts (~200 lines): lazy-loads MuPDF WASM (~13.8 MB) on first PDF open. importPdf(doc, history) — file picker → ArrayBuffer → mupdf.Document.openDocument() → page.toSVG() → post-process (strip metadata, normalize paths, group elements) → import into document. Text comes as path outlines (same as Illustrator). Initially first page only. Add Open PDF to File menu in App.tsx. Extract shared parseSvgString() from fileio.ts for reuse. AGPL-3.0 license. Write 4 tests for SVG post-processing.
title: MuPDF.js WASM PDF import

close_reason: offsetPath.ts with polyline sampling + Catmull-Rom fitting + RDP simplification + 5 tests
description: Create src/model/offsetPath.ts (~150 lines): polyline-based approach — sample path at fine intervals, compute normal at each point, offset by distance, fit cubic Beziers to offset points. offsetPathD(d, distance) returns new d string. Positive = outward, negative = inward. Add Offset Path... to Object menu with distance prompt. Write 5 tests (square offset, circle, negative, zero).
title: Offset path

description: Create src/model/smartGuides.test.ts (~120 lines, 10 tests): snap directions, tolerance, guide positions, point candidates, endpoint snap. Create src/model/shapeToPath.test.ts (~80 lines, 6 tests): each converter, rounded rect, extractStyleAttrs.
title: smartGuides.ts + shapeToPath.ts tests (16 tests)

description: Modify src/App.tsx: add 5 Object menu items. Requires exactly 2 selected elements. Auto-converts non-path elements via elementToPathD() first. Creates CompoundCommand (remove originals + add result paths). Divide produces multiple separate path elements. Depends on pathBooleans.ts wrapper.
title: Add boolean ops to Object menu (Unite/Subtract/Intersect/Exclude/Divide)

close_reason: knifeTool.ts with cut-line path splitting + intersectLineWithPath/splitPathAtT in pathOps + 7 tests + icon
description: Create src/tools/knifeTool.ts (~180 lines): click-drag to draw cut line across canvas, on mouseup find intersections with all paths under the cut line, split each intersected path at intersection points. Add to pathOps.ts: intersectLineWithPath(lineStart, lineEnd, pathCommands) returns {segIndex, t}[], splitPathAtT(commands, segIndex, t) splits at parametric value. Line-line intersection (closed form) + line-cubic (iterative subdivision). Register tool. Write 9 tests.
title: Knife tool

close_reason: artboard.ts with CRUD + layout + pub-sub + Canvas integration + 12 tests
description: ~500 lines. Architectural change: each artboard is a <rect data-role=artboard> with index/name and own coordinate origin. Canvas shows all artboards with space between. Export targets specific artboard. Document model needs artboard list management. Affects viewBox, coordinate system, and export pipeline. High risk.
title: Multiple artboards

close_reason: Ruler.tsx with adaptive ticks, cursor tracking + 7 tests + grid layout
description: Create src/components/Ruler.tsx (~200 lines): canvas-based rendering, adaptive tick intervals [0.1, 0.2, 0.5, 1, 2, 5, 10, 20, 50, 100...] based on zoom, mouse position tracking highlight, drag from ruler creates guide via existing addGuide(). 20px ruler width. Modify App.tsx to wrap Canvas in grid layout with horizontal ruler (top) and vertical ruler (left). Pass viewBox/cursor from Canvas state to rulers. Write 5 tests.
title: Custom canvas-based rulers with adaptive ticks
